source_pr.title: planner: move some estimation functions from the physical-optimization package into cardinality package
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Issue Number: ref #46358 Problem Summary: Move the Selectivity function from the stats package into cardinality package ### What is changed and how it works? **No logical change, just some code movement.** Follow with https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/46359 Move the Selectivity function from the stats package. ### Check List Tests - [ ] Unit test - [x] Integration test - [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below) - [ ] No code Side effects - [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU - [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory - [ ] Breaking backward compatibility Documentation - [ ] Affects user behaviors - [ ] Contains syntax changes - [ ] Contains variable changes - [ ] Contains experimental features - [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility ### Release note Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note. ```release-note None ```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: race = "on",.

evidence: files: executor/BUILD.bazel, executor/show_stats.go, planner/cardinality/BUILD.bazel, planner/cardinality/pseudo.go, planner/cardinality/row_size.go, planner/cardinality/row_size_test.go, planner/core/exhaust_physical_plans.go, planner/core/find_best_task.go, planner/core/logical_plans.go, planner/core/physical_plans.go, planner/core/plan_cost_ver1.go, planner/core/plan_cost_ver2.go, planner/core/task.go, planner/implementation/BUILD.bazel, planner/implementation/datasource.go, statistics/column.go, statistics/handle/ddl_test.go, statistics/handle/handletest/BUILD.bazel, statistics/handle/handletest/handle_test.go, statistics/table.go
